programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: After witnessing a stabbing Chris becomes the target of the prepetrator who has a history of making witnesses disappear Meanwhile the NYPD brass demand stress reduction classes for the 14th Precinct

programme.title: Starsky and Hutchy
programme.desc: A series of suspicious deaths at a professional wrestling arena bring Starsky and Hutch into the squared circle a world of outsized stars misfits and greed-consumed con men

programme.title: The Gun and the Pulpit
programme.desc: After narrowly escaping a lynch mob atheist gunslinger Ernie Parsons Marjoe Gortner steals the identity of a murdered preacher and takes his job in a western town Ernie falls for the beautiful Sally Underwood Pamela Sue Martin and becomes attached to the town hes come to think of as his sanctuary So when his new home is threatened by a tyrannical land baron Ernie must use both his extensive skills as a gunfighter and his minimal skills as a preacher to defend the townspeople

programme.desc: When a group of World War 1 buddies head west to farmstead they run into trouble

programme.title: The Hitchhiker

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A couple move into an old house that is supposedly haunted but the wife soon realizes just whos haunting the house Later another couple move into the house and form an unusual relationship with the moving man

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Painter Jack Craig gains himself a wealthy patron when he sells a morbid painting He soon finds that in order to please his patron he must continue to paint pictures of death - and this leads him down a murderous path

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Four boys find out that the local undertaker and a pharmacist are in cahoots to murder rich locals and profit from their funerals

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Loud arrogant and obnoxious criminal Trout feels a strong kinship with and develops an immediate affinity for nerdy mild-mannered and soft-spoken serial killer Wax However the close bond between these two radically contrasting lunatics falls apart after the pair pick up a brash prostitute

programme.desc: Max inherits the position of union negotiator between agents and CONTROL

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ wrecks his truck and while Bobbie Sue nurses him back to health BJ reminisces about the many beautiful women in his past

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur promises a magician that he will take care of his elephant for a few days and Eds not too thrilled with the idea Meanwhile Kay brings home one wrong dog too many so Roger moves into a motel

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur and Roger buy the contract of a professional heavyweight wrestler

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: To get an Italian officer to defect the Heroes use pizza to tempt him

programme.title: Hogans Heroes

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While on a hike Gomer makes a friend but when the friend decides to move into the barracks Sgt Carter wants him gone! but Gomer shows the Sgt what an asset this new friend is to the platoon

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: After tipping his hat instead of saluting female Captain Iron Pants Martin Gomer is assigned special detail in her office to teach him a lesson But it turns out that he is the teacher instead of the student as he reminds her that she is more then just a Marine

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Wood and Ava are spending a lot of time with Gil and Madeline Hall but the Halls increasingly frequent sexual banter is making Wood and Ava nervous enough to reevaluate the friendship

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Woods visiting high school friends tell incriminating stories about him to Ava and Evan And Woods former fiancée Rebecca Kincaid is back in town and still carrying a torch for him

programme.title: Vegas
programme.desc: When a Savoy employee is busted with an underage prostitute the sheriff the FBI and the casino all make their play to get the parties to cooperate Meanwhile Dixon and Violets romance heats up

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Dick and Joanna renew their vows - sort of Stef is Maid of Honor and George is Best Man

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Neeg is killed by a bacteria that is deadly to both Taelons and Humans If it spreads it might be disastrous A new racist group attacks a community center

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: In the midst of the post apocalyptic future the team decide to throw a birthday party for Debi Meanwhile the Morthren attempt to locate their malfunctioning seeing-eye device a self-controlled drone which has run amok through the city

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A scientist from Alec Hollands past is employed by a businessman who claims he wants to build a recycling plant near the swamp

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Will starts dating a girl from a carnival Her boss who is manipulating the young carnies wants to sacrifice Will to the forces of darkness in a scam to keep his young work force in line

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Whilst Koenig and Maya are exploring a planet called Luton which is lush in vegetation she picks a flower and he helps himself to some fruit As a result they are put on trial for murder by three talking trees the Judges of Luton The trial is by combat and the pair must face three aliens one with super-strength one which can render itself invisible and one which can teleport

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: The Liberation sends a team to destroy the scarecrow probe before the Taelons crack it Joshua Doors is appointed as secretary of Human-Taelon relations

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Angered by the rising cost of health care an old man tries to pay his friends bills by threatening a businessman with the bombing of his buildings

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: A prince the absolute ruler of a principality has 15 million which he plans to use for arms to wage war on a neighboring oil-rich country Briggs devises a scheme that involves breaking the bank of the princes casino First the IMF will utilize a computer to take 200000 at roulette That will provide the stake the IMF needs to take the prince at a high-stakes game of baccarat

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday becomes emotionally involved in a rape-murder case of a Japanese-American war widow especially after he sees how beautiful she was and after he finds out that she left a young daughter behind Also there might be a connection with the rape of another woman the previous night Now Friday and Gannon must search for the rapist before he strikes again

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A police officer is shot during a routine stop of a car Friday and Gannon find the driver and passenger and learn they are paroled convicts The police officer cannot remember anything about the shooting event to help convict the two men

programme.title: The Wizard of Speed and Time
programme.desc: A Hollywood filmmaker Mike Jittlov makes a short for an evil film studio Unbeknownest to him the producer has placed a bet of 25000 that he wont come up with anything with a use Luckily our film creator gets the help of his friends

programme.title: Android
programme.desc: A strange doctor secretly experiments with androids on his space station His assistant is Max a curious android who wants to see the world and meet a girl Criminals hide on their station and soon violence erupts

programme.title: Embryo
programme.desc: A twisted scientist performs an experiment on a human foetus to accelerate growth from a foetus into an adult in just a few days The experiment results in a beautiful 22-year-old woman who falls in love with her creator

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: King Kong Vs Godzilla
programme.desc: Godzilla a prehistoric monster emerges from hibernation while a pharmaceutical company seeks publicity by bringing in another monster When the two battle it out death and destruction follow

programme.title: Billionaire Boys Club
programme.desc: Ron Levin a wealthy businessman has disappeared No body is found but there was a list with instructions in his house - a recipe for murder Its author Joe Hunt is the defendant The successful young business man had formed a team of prestigious former fellow students for a risky project which should make them all rich His partners claim they didnt know about the means

programme.desc: Four college students become immersed in fantasy role-playing games causing tragic results; based on Rona Jaffes book

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 45 continues to bring you some of the best fights in MMA! This episode features matchups between amateur debut fighters Abbas Faleh vs. Tarren Gallamore and strikers Les Bisson vs. Gerra Gossen. The last fight of the night is an exciting Lightweight pro bout between Wolfgang Janssen and Craig Shintani. You do not want to skip this one!

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Chris Kaminesky v. Damien DiMarco - HKF

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 46 opens with a rare treat: a ladies pro match between champions in differening disciplines, both looking to make their transition to MMA. Lindsay Garbatt is a former World Champion in Boxing while Valeria Mejia is a Pan-American Champion in Sambo. Following this is the main event of the evening, a challenge for the vacant Bantamweight title between Jesse Arnett and Dimitri Waardenburg! You do not want to miss this!

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Connor Hayes v. Arydas Pumputis

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Mohammed Jaraya v. Redouan Laarkoubi

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Pouria Rashidi v. Dominic Dillon

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Adam Zarrillo v. Mike Papesquash.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Patriots Report
programme.desc: Christopher Price of the Boston Globe and former Patriots WR Chris Hogan bring you an inside look at the New England Patriots.

programme.title: Betting with Bearman
programme.desc: Betting with Bearman is your go-to podcast for sharper sports betting insights. Hosted by David Bearman, a 20-year veteran of the betting industry, each episode dives into the biggest games, top betting trends, and key line movements. Bearman and his guests share their top picks, best bets, leans, and stay-away plays, helping you make smarter decisions and stay ahead of the odds.

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: SEC State of Mind
programme.desc: Former SEC Player of the Year and nine-year NFL veteran Jason Campbell teams up with ESPN reporter Taylor Davis on SEC State of Mind. With experience from the field to the booth to the sideline, they bring fresh insight and access while covering the entire Southeastern Conference.

programme.title: Bleav In Falcons
programme.desc: Bleav in Falcons is hosted by former Falcons fullback Ovie Mughelli, a two-time Pro Bowler and standout running Michael Turner, a two-time All-Pro and Pro Bowler, was a standout running back for the Falcons and providing expert insights and in-depth coverage of the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.desc: Their mystic weapons start to fail them Dungeon Master tells his pupils they need to be recharged in the Hall of Bones But first they must find a guide to the Hall

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters a unicorn being attacked They manage to help the Unicorn but Uni is captured by a wizard who is capturing Unicorns and stealing their magical horns They must stop the wizard before he become even more powerful than Venger

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Neron captures the Herculoids to fight gladiatorial battles in his arenaThe Temple of Trax seems to be abandoned In reality the high priest has a plan to kidnap Tara and sacrifice her for the return of Trax after 2000 years

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce and Herc land the barge on a planet with incredibly huge plants Saw Boss is sending vines to grow there and Jayce must stop them But Jayce Gillian and Herc are captured by warrior crusaders Oon stumbles into the castle where they are being held and accidentally removes the shield from the stone making him the new leader Everyone joins together to rid the planet of monster minds The crusaders learn that not all intruders are enemies; some are friends

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce is led to an abandoned ship by a signal from his father Jayce finds his father has left a message for him but he needs more power from the Pride to receive the coordinates of his fathers destination A self-destruct mechanism is activated and Jayce must work quickly to get the message while battling monster minds They get away with only seconds to spare

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Two boys find a mock-up of a Space Shuttle in the Everglades VENOM is after the actual thing Alex Sector takes over as MASK leader after Matt Trakker is bitten by a snake
